title: retn0's SMARTctl Exporter Dashboard
description: SMART storage observability dashboard for NVMe/SATA devices via smartctl_exporter and Prometheus.

targets.expr: count(count by (instance) (max by (instance, device) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))) or vector(0)

count(max by (instance, device) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}))) or vector(0)

count((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_smart_status{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} != 1)) and on(instance, device) (max by (instance, device) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))) or vector(0)

count((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_critical_warning{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} > 0)) and on(instance, device) (max by (instance, device) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))) or vector(0)

count((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_media_errors{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} > 0)) and on(instance, device) (max by (instance, device) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))) or vector(0)

count((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_error_log_count{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} > 0)) and on(instance, device) (max by (instance, device) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))) or vector(0)

max by (instance, device, model_name) (((100 - smartctl_device_percentage_used{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"}) * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})) or max by (instance, device, model_name) ((smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name=~"Percent_Lifetime_Remain|Wear_Leveling_Count|Media_Wearout_Indicator",attribute_value_type="value"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}))

max by (instance, device, model_name) (smartctl_device_temperature{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

max by (instance, device, model_name) (smartctl_device_temperature{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_smart_status{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_critical_warning{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_media_errors{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_error_log_count{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_power_on_seconds{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_power_cycle_count{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_bytes_read{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) or (max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Total_LBAs_Read",attribute_value_type="raw"} * on(instance, device) smartctl_device_block_size{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",blocks_type="logical"}))) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_bytes_written{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) or (max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Total_LBAs_Written",attribute_value_type="raw"} * on(instance, device) smartctl_device_block_size{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",blocks_type="logical"}))) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_capacity_bytes{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (device) ((smartctl_device_power_on_seconds{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} / 3600) * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

max by (device) (smartctl_device_power_cycle_count{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

(max by (instance, device, model_name, protocol) (smartctl_device_bytes_read{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name, protocol) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})) or (max by (instance, device, model_name, protocol) ((smartctl_device_bytes_read{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"}) * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name, protocol) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}) or max by (instance, device, model_name, protocol) ((smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Total_LBAs_Read",attribute_value_type="raw"} * on(instance, device) smartctl_device_block_size{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",blocks_type="logical"}) * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name, protocol) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}))

(max by (instance, device, model_name, protocol) (smartctl_device_bytes_written{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name, protocol) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})) or (max by (instance, device, model_name, protocol) ((smartctl_device_bytes_written{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"}) * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name, protocol) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}) or max by (instance, device, model_name, protocol) ((smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Total_LBAs_Written",attribute_value_type="raw"} * on(instance, device) smartctl_device_block_size{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",blocks_type="logical"}) * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name, protocol) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}))

max by (instance, device, model_name) (smartctl_device_available_spare{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

max by (instance, device, model_name) (smartctl_device_available_spare_threshold{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"} * on(instance, device) group_left(model_name) smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_critical_warning{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_media_errors{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"nvme",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"}))
max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Current_Pending_Sector",attribute_value_type="raw"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Offline_Uncorrectable",attribute_value_type="raw"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Reallocated_Sector_Ct",attribute_value_type="raw"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="Reallocated_Event_Count",attribute_value_type="raw"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="UDMA_CRC_Error_Count",attribute_value_type="raw"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (clamp_min(delta(smartctl_device_attribute{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk",attribute_name="UDMA_CRC_Error_Count",attribute_value_type="raw"}[24h]), 0))) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) ((max by (instance, device) (smartctl_device_error_log_count{instance=~"$node",device=~"$disk"})) * on(instance, device) group_left(protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (max by (instance, device, protocol, model_name, firmware_version, serial_number) (smartctl_device{interface=~"$type",interface=~"sat",serial_number=~"$serial_number",model_name=~"$device_model"})))

panels.title: SATA Reliability Table
panels.description: SATA fault-focused counters are healthiest at zero, and rising values should be prioritized for investigation.
